name: CV / Resume
description: Candidate CVs for recruitment — works across any layout or format.
instructions: Extract: full name, email, phone number, location (city + country), LinkedIn URL, current role or headline, years of total experience, work experience as an array (each item: company, role, start date, end date, description), education as an array (each item: institution, degree, field of study, graduation year), skills as an array of strings, languages as an array (each item: language + level). Mark fields not present in the document as null.
